title: Set up Resend for transactional email
summary: Complete Resend setup — install, API key, send emails, React Email templates, API routes, domain verification, and common pitfalls.
declaration: Resend is a modern email API built for developers, with first-class React Email support. I will install Resend, configure the API key, set up email sending, and create a template. If you prefer SendGrid, Postmark, or another email service, say so before I begin.
